title: Us Dry Bulk Flows
summary:
Main
Dry Weekly Market Monitor - Week 15, 2025 Snapshot of Spot Freight Rates, Supply-Demand Trends, Port Congestions April 09, 2025
Escalation of U.S.-China Trade Tensions: Implications for Dry Bulk Freight
On April 4th, China announced a 34% tariff on all U.S. imports, a retaliatory response to recent U.S. protectionist trade measures, effective April 10th.

children.title: Grain Trade at Risk: China as the Top Buyer
section_path: Grain Trade at Risk: China as the Top Buyer
children.section_path_text: Grain Trade at Risk: China as the Top Buyer
children.summary: According to Q1 2025 data, China accounts for 52.8% of U.S. grain exports to Far East destinations, with Japan and South Korea following at 23.3% and 9.0%, respectively.
